threats.title: Vercel Breach Tied to Context AI Hack Exposes Limited Customer Credentials
threats.summary: Web infrastructure provider Vercel has disclosed a security breach that allows bad actors to gain unauthorized access to "certain" internal Vercel systems. The incident stemmed from the compromise of Context.ai, a third-party artificial intelligence (AI) tool, that was used by an employee at the company. threats.title: [Webinar] Eliminate Ghost Identities Before They Expose Your Enterprise Data
threats.summary: In 2024, compromised service accounts and forgotten API keys were behind 68% of cloud breaches. Not phishing. Not weak passwords. Unmanaged non-human identities that nobody was watching. threats.title: $13.74M Hack Shuts Down Sanctioned Grinex Exchange After Intelligence Claims
threats.summary: Grinex, a Kyrgyzstan-incorporated cryptocurrency exchange sanctioned by the U.K. and the U.S. last year, said it's suspending operations after it blamed Western intelligence agencies for a $13.74 million hack. threats.title: Mirai Variant Nexcorium Exploits CVE-2024-3721 to Hijack TBK DVRs for DDoS Botnet
